full_text:
Meeting Notes

9/05/25

- Experiment planning

We are going to design a multi-omic experiment consisting of CyCIF, scRNAseq and Xenium.

Organoids and dissociated samples will be used (at least 3 paired).

1st batch consists of 9 samples of scRNAseq.

>> scRNAseq has been already generated. We will start exploring this data. The idea is to perform clustering (PRIMUS, CLUSTALL) and explore cell types here, with a major interest in tumor cells.

>> t-CyCIF would be generated. The panel of proteins to be analysed has to be selected.

>> Xenium would be generated from a maximum of 6 samples, in 3 slides. Preferably the paired samples will be used. It has to be decided if using whole transcriptome or a gene panel

The decision of the panel of proteins and going for whole transcriptome or a gene panel, would be based on the results we get from the following experiments:

We plan to derive a gene signature based on NMF after combining geoMx (eyemt) + CycIF experiments (Cell cycle). These results will be potentially presented in EACR congress in June.

- Coordinate meeting with Anna, Annina, Marieke to set the experiment planning

- Computer order from the system, and splitted to 2 WBS codes (which?). 3000-4000 euros.
